feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: the windows to the soul
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,226Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 46

Summary: After living for millenia, there's nothing anymore that drives Kal-el. His mountain overflows with treasures accumulated over lifetimes, and his city is thriving under his protection. He believes that he has everything, that nothing will stir his ancient heart. Until he meets Bruce Wayne, that is. --- Bruce, on the other hand, is sacrificed to the great dragon to save the dying city of Gotham. Now, he must learn to appease the dragon, to save himself, at the very least.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Dragon Clark Kent

entry.title: Cage of Roses
entry.summary:
Author: endofer

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,741Chapters: 3/14Kudos: 39

Summary: The story Clark had heard wasn't entirely clear and previous monster hunters who'd come investigating had been sent packing, unwilling to talk about it. Some details remained the same between retellings: there was a monstrous creature in this town, it punished crime and protected the town from invasion, and it occasionally asked for a human sacrifice.In a castle overlooking a town lives a monstrous bat creature. It is the town’s protector and a source of fear. Clark Kent hears about these rumours and comes to investigate. A retelling Beauty and the Beast with MonsterHunter!Clark and Beast!Bruce ft. Alfred and a handful of batkids.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Coming Home to you
entry.summary:
Author: g0j0_Kat

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,651Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: Domestic Superbat with a sprinkle of angst “I never understood the meaning of life until I met you, Clark,” he whispered. "I'm glad it was you, Clark.” “I'm really glad.”

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part Three
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 108,778Chapters: 8/15Kudos: 6

Summary: The Silax treatment is ready, but the cure is no simple rescue. To silence the queen inside him, Aven must let the inhibitor fail, wake the thing Weyland-Yutani built him to carry, and trust Bruce, Clark, Amanda, his brothers, and the children he left behind to keep him alive through the worst of it. For the first time, everyone is in the same room. Secrets come out. Old wounds split open. Family stops being something Aven can protect from a distance and becomes the only reason he can face what comes next. But beyond the Fortress, LexCorp’s stolen files reveal that Weyland’s work has not stopped with Aven. The procedure may end one nightmare. It may also uncover the next. (God, I really suck at summaries lmao)

entry.title: But you can't take the circus from the boy
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,922Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 403

Summary: Damian Wayne has everything he's ever wanted. A beautiful husband. A precious child. A title of his own. Even his siblings, having experienced horrors beyond their years, are growing as people alongside him. But with everything in his life moving so smoothly, he can't help but wonder when the other shoe will drop. Happiness isn't something that comes easily to Demons, after all.

entry.title: breathe
entry.summary:
Author: tummyclub

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,092Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 45

Summary: Bruce Wayne has a panic attack at a press conference- and runs into none other than Clark Kent, reporter for the Daily Planet. What happens when sparks fly despite the age gap, public opinion, and their respective superhero identities?

entry.title: How to Not Be Bruce Wayne's Biggest Disappointment
entry.summary:
Author: Dracula4life

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,192Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 7

Summary: Ever since returning from "the incident" Jason Todd hasn't been the same kid that Bruce met in an alleyway. He gets into fights daily, is stuck in permanent detention, and at this point has mostly given up on ever truly being part of the Wayne family again. But when Jason's English teacher is out of class for months on paternity leave, and a long-term substitute teacher takes his place, Jason finds himself feeling the one thing he hasn't in a long time. Hope. As Jason navigates through his trauma, Mr. Kent offers a safe space for Jason to explore not only his past, but what his future might hold. This takes place years before Clinging to What's Lost and will briefly co-occur with my fic Breaking Down Barriers.

entry.title: The day the Earth became Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Philis283

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,646Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 452

Summary: Based on 'The Kryptonians who invaded Earth' the Kryptonians have run out of Omega's due to an unexplained viruses, so the travel to planets to find a comparable species which happens to be Earth. Where Kal finds his dream Omega called Bruce Wayne.

entry.title: New World Order
entry.summary:
Author: MalloryB

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,565Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 60

Summary: Superman’s image has been dragged through the mud beyond repair, and the only people still willing to get dirty defending him are the people of Juhnrpan.And Bruce Wayne, for some reason.Meanwhile, the Batman is increasingly concerned about Superman’s erratic behavior following his involvement in the Juhnrpan vs Boravia conflict and decides the best way to investigate is through Superman’s only known associate: Daily Planet reporter Clark Kent.OrKrypto isn’t captured by Lex Luthor and Clark refuses to turn himself in. That sets off quite the chain reaction.Alternatively titled: How to Become a Dictator in Few Easy Steps! (Plus Superbat identity porn!)

entry.title: operation taming (romancing) the red hood
entry.summary:
Author: alleousai

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,856Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 219

Summary: The last thing Peter needed was a multiversal turn-around in the middle of America's Crime Capital, with his New York and secret identity at risk and his mental health down the drain. Lost and alone, he finds an abandoned coffee shop in Crime Alley and decides to make a home (and hideout) out of it until further notice, before a big guy dressed down in leather and quoting Jane Austen stumbles inside and demands recompense. One day is fine. Until the city's eyes are on him and the once-run down coffee shop becomes a haven for superheroes and civilians and metahumans alike, and all Peter wants to do is go back home and save New York. Tangled in a web of adventure, secrets and lies, the Red Hood won't let him go, nor will the Batfamily. Peter detonating won't be too bad of an idea, right? He couldn't be further from the truth. And Jason Todd trusted him enough to put him back together.

entry.title: It's a Small World, After All
entry.summary:
Author: whosmorales

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,425Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: After moving to Metropolis for work, Bruce finds himself increasingly lonely and disconnected from his own life. Much in the same way, Clark's temporary job as a barista seems less temporary every day that goes by. Disillusioned and dissatisfied with their circumstances, both men are starstruck upon meeting each other, and try to maintain and understand their connection. or Bruce Wayne is a frustrated office worker running on little sleep. Thankfully, Clark Kent is here to sell him coffee.

entry.title: Sharing is Caring
entry.summary:
Author: synner (xsynnerx)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,747Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 35

Summary: “Yes, my… my soul hurt. I needed to see you. I… I'll shut up. I know you don't want to hear it.” Bruce hesitated before stepping closer. This just kept getting stranger. “I want to hear it now,” he urged. “I bare my soul to you,” Kal said finally, continuing to whisper. “I share my soul with you.” Or: Bruce accidentally bonds himself to a Kryptonian

entry.title: Penumbra
entry.summary:
Author: Buukkin

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,179Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 7

Summary: Ultraman made it out of the black hole with only his last orders in mind: Kill Superman.He fails. He gets to know Clark. He gets to know himself. And when Clark really needs to go back to his life, he calls in a trusted friend to help the newly liberated clone find his footing in this world.Bruce Wayne just wants to keep a dangerous and unstable metahuman under control at first, but his guest proves to be surprisingly charming.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
